_comment: Phase 6.2 — a deliberately mixed identity policy for the IAM Policy Simulator drill. It ALLOWS S3 read/list broadly, EXPLICITLY DENIES deleting buckets, and allows StartInstances only when MFA is present. Simulate actions against it with scripts/phase-6/run_policy_simulator.py to see explicitDeny (DeleteBucket), allowed (GetObject), and implicitDeny + MissingContextValues (StartInstances without aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent). NOTE: this uses plain Bool, not BoolIfExists, on purpose -- with Bool, an ABSENT MFA key fails the condition so the drill shows the deny + MissingContextValues; pass --mfa to flip it to allowed. (Contrast Phase 5's require-MFA SCP, which uses BoolIfExists because a DENY-when-no-MFA must not fire on contexts where the key is legitimately absent.) Nothing here is deployed -- it's input for simulate_custom_policy.
